import pandas as pd
cases_data = locals()['var_function-call-10737225861836197435']
df = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)
df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(df['createddate'])
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-08-16')
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2023-01-16')
filtered_df = df[(df['createddate'] >= start_date) & (df['createddate'] <= end_date)]
issue_counts = filtered_df['issueid__c'].value_counts()
most_frequent_issue = issue_counts.index[0]
print('__RESULT__:')
print(most_frequent_issue)
